title: Lane 2 front-half ecology richness
summary: Deepen beach, coastal scrub, and forest-edge ecology through existing content, note, comparison, and close-look seams.

execution_order.goal: Scope a front-half content pack that reinforces coast-to-forest relationships.
execution_order.why_now: Lane 2 can keep improving early-game density without waiting on systems.

execution_order.goal: Implement the scoped front-half ecology richness pass.
execution_order.why_now: The early route experience should feel as authored as the high-country branch.

execution_order.goal: Review front-half content for science safety, readability, and lane boundaries.
execution_order.why_now: Content density should not become UI or route-system drift.

completion_gate: Front-half ecology gains one compact content layer on existing surfaces.
Science-source ledger and content-quality checks stay current.
No station, route, travel, save, geometry, or broad `game.ts` scope lands.
guardrails: Prefer existing notes, comparison, close-look, and prompt seams.
Leave systems and spatial requests as handoffs.
post_packet_path: If clean, proceed to forest sub-ecosystem content.

scout_490_handoff.selected_scope: A comparison-routing-only salmonberry pass that reuses existing Coastal Scrub and Forest Trail notes to make the front-half same-pane journal comparison more relationship-focused.
implementation_contract: Prefer Coastal Scrub note `berry-cover-chain` and Forest Trail note `berry-seed-shuttle`.
Update the salmonberry fixture in `src/test/journal-comparison.test.ts` so both preferred notes are locally unlocked and expected.
Do not edit science ledger rows because the pass reuses already reviewed notes and source coverage.
out_of_scope: No new inspectables, sprites, close-look seeds, observation prompts, ecosystem notes, atlas pages, badge/reward economy, station changes, route-state changes, travel changes, save changes, geometry, traversal, or broad `game.ts` work.
No fourth Source to Shore beat and no new page shell.

implemented_scope: Added `salmonberry` comparison note preferences for Coastal Scrub `berry-cover-chain` and Forest Trail `berry-seed-shuttle`.
Updated the salmonberry journal-comparison fixture to unlock and expect the preferred notes.

critic_490_review.review_summary: The salmonberry comparison-routing pass is source-safe, compact, and lane-local. It reuses existing reviewed notes, follows the established preferred-note unlock policy, and adds no station, route, save, geometry, page, reward, or fourth-beat scope.
